ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data is collected */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the economic indicator */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of data collection */,
  "historical_data_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to identify the historical data */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  "derived_metric" REAL /* Derived metric (e.g., 100 - Employment Rate) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data point */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data point is published or not */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_historical_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("historical_data_symbol") REFERENCES historical_data_symbols ("symbol_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES data_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country's data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the category (e.g., macroeconomic, microeconomic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval between data collections (e.g., 1 month, 3 months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symbol */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the historical data set */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the historical data set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata (e.g., string, integer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derived_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derived metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the metric is derived from */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the derived metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the derived metric */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the derived metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derived_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the metric belongs to */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "quality_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_lineage" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the lineage belongs to */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system of the data point */,
  "source_table" TEXT /* Source table of the data point */,
  "load_date" TEXT /* Date the data point was loaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)
